description_long: This wheelchair features a lightweight, tubular metal frame with a matte black finish, supporting a taut, dark fabric seat and backrest. The large rear wheels are spoked and equipped with push rims for manual propulsion, while the smaller front caster wheels provide maneuverability. The armrests are straight and parallel to the seat, offering support and stability for the user. The footrests are fixed, flat, and extend forward, providing a stable platform for the feet. The push handles at the back are standard, straight, and covered with textured grips for comfortable handling. Overall, the design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, and public spaces.
description: A matte black, spoked-wheel wheelchair with a fabric seat, fixed footrests, and standard push handles. The design is sturdy and practical for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, straight armrests, and fixed footrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large spoked rear wheel, push rim, and the straight push handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the backrest and both push handles.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the spoked rear wheel, push rim, and the configuration of the footrest and handle.
attribute_wheel_type: Spoked wheels; two large rear wheels with push rims and two smaller solid front caster wheels.
attribute_frame_design: Rigid frame with straight tubular metal construction and no visible folding mechanism; includes cross-bracing for stability.
attribute_footrest_style: Fixed footrests; flat, rectangular, and non-detachable, extending forward from the frame.
attribute_handlebar_configuration: Standard straight push handles with textured grips, positioned at the top rear of the backrest.
